DP.272.0000:
What do you want?\f
Are you one of those nitwits we
fooled into guarding the entrance?\f
Bah, it doesn’t matter who you are.
It’s too late to make any difference.\f
Things are going to get really
interesting now.\f
All the legendary Pokémon are going
to be brought to our HQ in Veilstone!
DP.272.0001:
Even Team Galactic has no use for
MAGIKARP! Worthless, all of them!
DP.272.0002:
Hahaha!
Next stop, Lake Verity!\f
The closest civilization is that hick
town called Twinleaf!\f
We can roll in there completely
unopposed!
DP.272.0003: A MAGIKARP is weakly flopping about...
